hooks.command: bash -c 'changed="$CLAUDE_FILE"; if [[ "$changed" == *.el ]]; then lps=(-L . -L lisp); for d in packages/*/; do [ -d "$d" ] && lps+=(-L "$d"); done; if emacs --batch -Q "${lps[@]}" -f batch-byte-compile "$changed" 2>&1; then echo "[hook] $changed: byte-compile OK"; else echo "[hook] $changed: byte-compile FAILED"; fi; rm -f "${changed}c"; fi'

bash -c 'echo "[hook] Pre-commit lint check..."; lps=(-L . -L lisp); for d in packages/*/; do [ -d "$d" ] && lps+=(-L "$d"); done; files=(early-init.el init.el lisp/*.el); for p in packages/*/*.el; do [ -f "$p" ] && files+=("$p"); done; fail=0; for f in "${files[@]}"; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then emacs --batch -Q "${lps[@]}" -f batch-byte-compile "$f" 2>&1; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "[hook] FAIL: $f"; fail=1; fi; rm -f "${f}c"; fi; done; if [ $fail -eq 1 ]; then echo "[hook] Byte-compile errors detected. Fix before committing."; exit 1; fi; echo "[hook] All .el files compile clean (${#files[@]} files)."'
